message:
fix: doctor integrity checks use storage factory instead of raw SQLite (bd-7p1nh)

CheckDependencyCycles, CheckTombstones, and DetectHashBasedIDs used raw
sql.Open("sqlite3",...) and sqlite_master queries that fail with the Dolt
backend. Convert to storagefactory.NewFromConfigWithOptions() and
cross-DB compatible SQL (CONCAT instead of ||, direct table probe
instead of sqlite_master).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
